<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking the blue blob
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("=== Current key objects ===")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] not in ('B', 'c', 'W', 'b'):
        print(f"  id={n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
    elif n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check if blue blob still exists
blue_objects = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b']
print(f"\nBlue objects: {len(blue_objects)}")
for n in blue_objects:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check yellow objects
yellow_objects = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y']
print(f"\nYellow objects: {len(yellow_objects)}")
for n in yellow_objects:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check the bottom UI area
print("\n=== Bottom UI area (rows 40-48) ===")
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for r in range(40, 49):
    if r < len(ascii_lines):
        print(f"  row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][19:44]}")

# Check the top yellow area
print("\n=== Top yellow area (rows 12-18) ===")
for r in range(12, 18):
    if r < len(ascii_lines):
        print(f"  row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][28:36]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
